title: Pokerelics!
description: This mod adds Pokémon-inspired items, called Relics, that can be equipped and used for buffs under specific conditions. Let the journey begin!
body:
# Welcome to Pokerelics!

This mod adds unique items, called Pokérelics (**Relics** for short) to the game. These Relics can be equipped and used for buffs under specific conditions. These can be found in structures like **Jungle Temples**, **Nether Fortresses**, and **Ocean Ruins**.

Choose your starter relic, and let the journey begin! 

# Starter Relics:
![A model of the Bulb of Absorption.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fe470e1233f7bcc4c69100b7ae02f2a266696483.png)
## Bulb of Absorption (Passive):

_Passively increases the player’s hunger bar and saturation when worn in sunlight. 
Can be found in Jungle Temples._ 

**Durability**: 256 (Uses 1 durability per minute of activation)

**Repair Material**: Spore Blossom (shift + right-click with material in offhand to repair)
![A model of the Vigor Candle.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5a8d22da4b5cc55e909455e0e6dc1f36192ebad1.png)
## Vigor Candle (Passive):

_Has a 20% chance to infuse your critical hits with Fire Aspect for 5 seconds at a time, and will give Flame to your bow shots when activated. 
Can be found in Nether Fortresses._

**Durability**: 256 (uses 1 durability per activation)

**Repair Material**: Magma Cream

![A model of the Shell Sprayer.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d58f0d2ed9e9bce6ba52d63cfbe52cadf52a5230.png)
## Shell Sprayer (Passive):

_Sprays enemies with high-pressure water when attacked, dealing severe knockback.
Can be found in Ocean Ruins._

Durability: 256 (uses 1 durability per activation)

Repair Material: Scute

# Other Relics:
![A model of the Ancient Spoon.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/653fbab03872c3de3a68ebc37a4890f3c8670da3.png)
## Spoon of Ancients (Active):

_Makes entities levitate by holding Right-Click in their direction. 
Found in Ancient Cities._

Durability: 256 (Uses 1 durability per second of activation)

Repair Material: Experience Bottle


![A model of the Sinister Glove](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1b1b273ccb5c434e3f439e8385769580eb1b537b.png)
## Sinister Glove (Passive):

_When attacking from behind, has a 25% chance to stun enemies with Terror for 5 seconds. 
Found in Woodland Mansions._

Durability: 256

Repair Material: Phantom Membrane

![A model of the Hypnotic Pendant.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0506e38243ab607a931467ba856aba34bb72780b.png)

## Hypnotic Pendant (Active):

_A special pendant that pacifies angered neutral mobs and hypnotizes villagers into resetting their trade prices if attacked. 
Can be obtained from Wandering Trader trades._

**Durability**: 32

**Repair Material**: Iron Nugget

![A model of the Regal Amulet.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e0854c699460e6792a88c8113ba017614bf24bf8.png)

## Regal Amulet (Passive):

_When equipped, mobs have a 10% to drop extra loot. 
Can be obtained by trading with Piglins._

**Durability**: 32

**Repair Material**: Gold Nugget




As of 0.3.0, the Even More Relics! update, Pokerelics is now fully playable! Enjoy finding Pokerelics throughout your world and using them for an edge on foes.

The next major update (1.0.0, the Poryware Update) will add a new structure to the game called AlgoLabs, featuring cyberspace-themed items and blocks.

More exciting content to come!

_This mod was created for Minecraft ModJam 2025: Forge the Future._
